top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN a.element = 'H' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_hydrogen
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE m.molecule_id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT m2.molecule_id
    FROM molecule m2
    JOIN atom a2 ON m2.molecule_id = a2.molecule_id
    WHERE a2.element IN ('C', 'N', 'O', 'S', 'P', 'F', 'Cl', 'Br', 'I') -- common carcinogenic elements
);

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN a.element = 'H' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM atom a
JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN a.element = 'H' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_hydrogen
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE m.molecule_id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT m2.molecule_id
    FROM molecule m2
    JOIN atom a2 ON m2.molecule_id = a2.molecule_id
    WHERE a2.element IN ('C', 'N', 'O', 'S', 'P', 'F', 'Cl', 'Br', 'I') -- common carcinogenic elements
);

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN a.element = 'H' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM atom a
JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN a.element = 'H' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_hydrogen
FROM molecule m
INNER JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE m.molecule_id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT molecule_id 
    FROM atom 
    WHERE element IN ('C', 'N', 'O', 'S', 'P', 'F', 'Cl', 'Br', 'I')
);

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN a.element = 'H' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_hydrogen
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE m.molecule_id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT m2.molecule_id
    FROM molecule m2
    JOIN atom a2 ON m2.molecule_id = a2.molecule_id
    WHERE a2.element IN ('C', 'N', 'O', 'S', 'P', 'F', 'Cl', 'Br', 'I') -- common carcinogenic elements
);

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN a.element = 'H' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM atom a
JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN a.element = 'H' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM 
    molecule m
    JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE 
    m.molecule_id IN (
        SELECT DISTINCT a2.molecule_id 
        FROM atom a2
        WHERE a2.element = 'H'
    );

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN a.element = 'H' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_hydrogen
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE m.molecule_id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT m2.molecule_id
    FROM molecule m2
    JOIN atom a2 ON m2.molecule_id = a2.molecule_id
    WHERE a2.element IN ('C', 'N', 'O', 'S', 'P', 'F', 'Cl', 'Br', 'I') -- common carcinogenic elements
);
